title: Fix craft recipesFor to include crafting table recipes
description:
**Source:** External audit (Bug 3) | **Council:** P1

**Problem:** `index.js:1631` calls `bot.recipesFor(itemEntry.id, null, null, null)`. The 4th parameter (`craftingTable`) being `null` causes Mineflayer to filter OUT all recipes that require a crafting table before returning. Result: `recipes[0]` can never be a table recipe, and the entire table-search/pathfind logic at lines 1636-1651 is dead code. For items with ONLY table recipes (tools, furnace, chest, etc.), `recipesFor` returns empty array and throws "No recipe found".

**Fix:** Change the 4th argument from `null` to `true`:
```js
const recipes = bot.recipesFor(itemEntry.id, null, null, true);
```

This allows table recipes to be returned, and the existing `recipe.requiresTable` check + table-search logic becomes reachable and functional for the first time since Sprint 2a.

**Note:** The file header comment has claimed "craft case now pathfinds to nearest crafting table" since Sprint 2a — this has never actually worked. Update the comment after fix.

**Files:** `MineflayerAdapter/index.js:1631`

**Validation:** Craft a tool (e.g., wooden pickaxe) with a crafting table nearby — should succeed. Verify existing craft tests pass.
